title: Qwen3-Embedding-0.6B now available in Public Preview as a Databricks-hosted model
body: Mosaic AI Model Serving now supports [Qwen3-Embedding-0.6B](/aws/en/machine-learning/foundation-model-apis/supported-models#qwen3-embedding-0-6b) in [Public Preview](/aws/en/release-notes/release-types) as a Databricks-hosted model. You can access this model using [Foundation Model APIs pay-per-token](/aws/en/machine-learning/foundation-model-apis#token-foundation-apis).
